revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-6-180

A buoy fitted with one or more bells.

[[Image:Ch2_Fig56.jpg|400px|border]]


Note: In French, the term Bouee a Carillon is applied to a buoy bearing a group of bells.

{{IALAFooter}}
